title: Carbon Intensity Factors
description: Carbon intensity factors (gCO2/kWh) for each electricity generation fuel type used in Great Britain

Biomass.description: Carbon intensity factor for biomass generation in gCO2/kWh

Coal.description: Carbon intensity factor for coal generation in gCO2/kWh

Dutch Imports.description: Carbon intensity factor for electricity imported from the Netherlands in gCO2/kWh

Gas (Open Cycle).description: Carbon intensity factor for open cycle gas turbine generation in gCO2/kWh

Hydro.description: Carbon intensity factor for hydroelectric generation in gCO2/kWh

Irish Imports.description: Carbon intensity factor for electricity imported from Ireland in gCO2/kWh

Nuclear.description: Carbon intensity factor for nuclear generation in gCO2/kWh

Oil.description: Carbon intensity factor for oil generation in gCO2/kWh

Other.description: Carbon intensity factor for other generation types in gCO2/kWh

Solar.description: Carbon intensity factor for solar photovoltaic generation in gCO2/kWh
